race.description: Country Western Raceday – 23rd May Maiden Plate
race.comment: LET IT RIDE (4) progressed nicely second-up when beaten a lip at Balaklava over this trip. Nearing peak now and is drawn favourably again. Ready. GOODWIN GURU (13) has left herself with too much to do in her first two starts but was much better last time when closing off well late to grab third. Strips fitter and is drawn slightly kinder. Expecting her to give this a big shake. FIERCE KIWI (12) has been solid in her first two and should be somewhere near her top now. Expect her to drift back from the wide alley and charge hard late. DISCREETLY BLUE (2) has had plenty of cracks at it but continues to knock on the door. The rise to the mile could prove the trick. Keeping safe.
